title: diaphoranthema uniflora
intro: Diaphoranthema uniflora, also known as the single-flowered diaphoranthema, is a flowering plant native to Australia and New Guinea. It is used in traditional medicine and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, making it a potential treatment for conditions like bronchitis and pneumonia. Diaphoranthema uniflora is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion for medicinal purposes, and its leaves and flowers are used in herbal preparations.
